scripts.build: rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf artifacts/loan-tracker/node_modules && npx pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && npx pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && npx pnpm --filter @workspace/loan-tracker run build && echo 'vite build'
scripts.build:hostinger: pnpm --filter @workspace/loan-tracker run build && powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path artifacts/loan-tracker/dist/public/* -DestinationPath loankhatam-deploy.zip -Force"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
